'''Ma'Shraid''' was the second [[Intendant caste|intendant]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and [[Prefect/Legends|prefect]] of the second [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] to enter [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Her newly arrived [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] forces helped bolster the forces of Prefect [[Da'Gara]] of the [[Praetorite Vong]]. Her forces were used for the assault on [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]], where they were defeated by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and his allies. Her forces were also used for the defense of [[Helska system's star|Helska]]. Ma'Shraid was killed when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used [[shieldship]]s to reflect the energy waves of the [[yammosk]] stationed at [[Helska IV]] back to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], melting, then freezing, and finally shattering the planet, [[Battle of Helska IV|killing]] everyone on the world.
